svg.text: Database: aviation_dw (MySQL 8) · Schemas: bronze | silver | gold · Two source systems: AOMS & PSRS
✔ unit_price corrected (LEAST of price vs amount)
gate join: p.flight_number = ge.flight_id AND p.gate_number = ge.gate_number
boarding_status derived (No Show / Boarded / Not Boarded)
Join keys: b.flight_id = df.flight_id, b.passenger_id = dp.passenger_id
Joins: ret_retail_transactions ⟕ pax_passengers ⟕ ops_flights ⟕ dim_passengers ⟕ dim_flights
Source → Bronze (LOAD DATA INFILE, all VARCHAR)
Bronze → Silver (INSERT INTO … SELECT with transformations, TRUNCATE first)
Silver → Gold (CREATE VIEW, no data copied — views read silver directly)
Supporting join (dashed) — secondary table joined inside the same view
flight_id → links ops_flights ↔ ops_baggage ↔ ops_gate_events ↔ pax_passengers (as flight_number) ↔ ret_retail_transactions (as flight_number)
gate_number + flight_id → links pax_passengers ↔ ops_gate_events (dual-key join in fact_passenger_journey)
ret_retail_transactions filtered by: passport_number IN silver.pax_passengers AND flight_number IN silver.ops_flights
Database: aviation_dw (MySQL 8, utf8mb4) · Schemas: bronze | silver | gold · All DDL in: scripts/ · Profiling: bronze-analysis-and-proofing/ · Quality checks: tests/quality_checks_silver.sql
ret = retail · DWH meta: dwh_* suffix
